speaker: speaker1
text: ( A stranger stops to help ) Everything OK ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No ! My tour bus got a speeding ticket not ten minutes ago . Now my engine is on fire !

speaker: speaker1
text: I think that's just steam . Your engine's overheated .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you know a lot about cars ?

speaker: speaker1
text: A little bit . I'll take a look if you want me to .

speaker: speaker2
text: Please . Thank you so much for stopping .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , she's hot . Radiator's leaking . Looks like you were running her pretty hard .

speaker: speaker2
text: That must have been just before I got the speeding ticket .

speaker: speaker1
text: Did you have an accident recently ... Hey , wait a second ! I know this car !

speaker: speaker2
text: You do ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I ran into it a couple of weeks ago . What do you know ? Name's Hal .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm Akimbo . Nice to meet you , I guess .

speaker: speaker1
text: Boy , I'm sure sorry about your car . Hey , Akimbo , I wonder if you'd like to make a deal ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What kind of deal ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'd like to give you cash for the damage to your car .

speaker: speaker2
text: You don't want your insurance company to pay for it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'd rather not . They'll raise my rates . It'll cost me more in the long run .

speaker: speaker2
text: If you give me cash , do you care if I don't fix the car ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Hell , I don't care . Just don'T submit a report to your insurancecompany .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's a deal , Hal . Thanks again for stopping to help . And thanks for smashing my car !
